delegatedBy.description: Synthesize classification matrix and tackle order

turns.content:
Subagent gsd-doc-writer. Viết artifact tổng hợp cuối cùng.

ĐỌC (theo thứ tự):
1. .planning/codebase/COMMAND-EXECUTION-ANALYSIS-2026-05-18.md — Cluster A scores ~4.2/5
2. .planning/codebase/DELEGATION-QUEUE-ANALYSIS-2026-05-18.md — Cluster C scores 3.3/5
3. .planning/codebase/PTY-BACKGROUND-COMMAND-ANALYSIS-2026-05-18.md — Cluster B (no formal scores, need to infer)
4. .planning/research/external-repo-survey-pty-background-delegation-2026-05-18.md — external patterns
5. .planning/archive/2026-05-07/CUSTOM-TOOLS-CRITERIA-2026-05-05.md — 9 criteria definitions

GHI RA: .planning/codebase/TOOL-CLASSIFICATION-MATRIX-AND-TACKLE-ORDER-2026-05-18.md

NỘI DUNG:

## A) Phân loại ma trận (Classification Matrix)
Bảng so sánh 3 clusters theo format:

| Tool/Surface | Cluster | Hivemind Custom? | OpenCode Innate Equivalent? | External Pattern Match | Keep/Rework/Replace | Rationale |

Liệt kê TẤT CẢ tools/surfaces từ cả 3 clusters. Cột "OpenCode Innate" phải nêu cụ thể API nào (SDK session.command(), child-session dispatch, etc). Cột "External" nêu repo nào match.

## B) 9-Criteria Cross-Cluster Scorecard
Bảng:

| Criterion | Cluster A | Cluster B (infer) | Cluster C | Worst | Priority Fix |

Với Cluster B, chấm scores dựa trên source analysis (E1-E9 sections). Giải thích reasoning trong 1 dòng.

## C) Conflicts & Overlaps Map
Liệt kê TẤT CẢ conflicts/overlaps đã phát hiện, theo format:
| ID | Conflict | Between | Severity | Evidence Ref |

Severity: CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM / LOW

## D) Tackle Order (Khuyến nghị)
Xếp hạng theo priority, mỗi item:
- ID
- What to fix
- Which cluster
- Effort (S/M/L)
- Impact (what breaks if not fixed)
- Dependencies (must do before/after)
- Phase alignment (which CP-PTY phase it maps to)

## E) Recommended Approach
3 câu approach tổng: batch nào trước, batch nào sau, checkpoint nào.

NGÔN NGỮ: Tiếng Việt mô tả, English code/technical refs. Max 400 LOC.
TRẢ VỀ: filepath + 5 dòng tóm tắt chính (scores, conflicts count, tackle order top 3).
Synthesize classification matrix and tackle order

Artifact committed (`39a3403d`).
